idea: STRUCTURAL: Swap K and M loop order. K-loop outer, M-loop inner. Load RHS once per K-tile via TMA, then loop over all M-tiles sharing the same RHS. LHS loaded separately for each M-tile. Reduces RHS DRAM traffic by M_tiles factor (2x for this shape). Each CTA loads RHS 16x instead of 32x.
expected_gain: +10-20% TFLOPS from halved RHS memory traffic
